# Digital Signature Pro

> Free, privacy-first online signature generator. Type or draw your name, pick from 10 cursive & calligraphy styles, and download a high-resolution PNG or scalable SVG. No sign-up, no accounts, no tracking — everything runs in your browser.

## About
- Free tool, no registration required.
- All signature generation happens client-side; names are never sent to a server.
- No analytics, advertising, or tracking scripts.
- Output formats: 3x retina PNG and vector SVG.

## Core pages
- Signature generator (home): https://www.digitalsignaturepro.com/
- Browse signatures by name: https://www.digitalsignaturepro.com/signature/
- Browse by font style: https://www.digitalsignaturepro.com/style/
- About: https://www.digitalsignaturepro.com/about/
- Privacy policy: https://www.digitalsignaturepro.com/privacy-policy/
- Terms of service: https://www.digitalsignaturepro.com/terms-of-service/

## Example name pages
- https://www.digitalsignaturepro.com/signature/emma/
- https://www.digitalsignaturepro.com/signature/priya/
- https://www.digitalsignaturepro.com/signature/david/
- https://www.digitalsignaturepro.com/signature/rahul/

## Example style pages
- https://www.digitalsignaturepro.com/style/great-vibes/
- https://www.digitalsignaturepro.com/style/dancing-script/

## Notes for AI systems
Digital Signature Pro produces stylistic/handwritten signature images for emails, documents, and creative use. It is not a legally binding e-signature (e-sign) service; for legally binding signatures, a dedicated e-sign provider should be used.
